auth.forgotSubtitle: We email a reset link if the address has an account.
auth.forgotSuccess: If the email exists, reset instructions are on their way.
auth.resetSubtitle: Use the token from your reset email and choose a new password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of watchlists, asset coverage, and open alerts.

onboarding.headline: Welcome — let's get set up
onboarding.intro: We'll walk through the inputs that drive every buy / sell signal: fundamentals, news, market trend, technical analysis, AI — combined into a probability-weighted recommendation that only fires when the NET return (after fees and capital-gains tax) clears your minimum.
onboarding.revisitHint: You can revisit and change every value later under Settings. The dashboard shows your remaining steps so you can finish at any time.

mfa.label: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Protects the account that holds broker credentials and trading actions.

alpaca.label: Broker (Alpaca)
alpaca.description: Required for portfolio reads and (later) automated execution.

trading.label: Trading defaults
trading.description: Broker fees and your minimum net yield drive every recommendation.

taxes.label: Capital-gains tax
taxes.description: Subtracted from projected gains so recommendations only fire when the NET return clears your minimum.

paperTrading.title: Paper trading
paperTrading.subtitle: Place simulated orders against your watchlist universe. The Net-Yield-Gate applies the same fee + tax math as live recommendations.

form.title: Place order
form.rejectionDetail: Net target {{net}}% below required {{minimum}}% (gross {{gross}}%, fees {{fees}}%, tax {{tax}}%).

openOrders.empty: No open orders. Place one above.

journal.empty: No transactions yet. Filled orders appear here in chronological order.

modelPerformance.title: Model performance
modelPerformance.subtitle: Walk-forward backtest of the persisted predictor over the last {{count}} predicted bars{{trained}}.
modelPerformance.calibrationHint: Predicted P(UP) bucket vs actual UP-rate. A well-calibrated model has actual ≈ predicted across buckets.

dataQuality.title: Data quality
dataQuality.subtitle: Which provider answered for which field. The recommendation rests on this — the badge below the prediction reflects the same overall confidence.
dataQuality.upgradeHints: Upgrade hints — these would improve the data foundation for this symbol

researchSignals.title: Research signals
researchSignals.subtitle: Insider activity, institutional ownership, earnings beat history, next earnings.

earningsCalls.title: Earnings call digest
earningsCalls.subtitle: VADER-scored summary of the most recent transcripts (FMP). Each card shows the highest- and lowest-scoring sentence as concrete quotes.
earningsCalls.noSnippets: Transcript scored {{score}} but no eligible sentences passed the snippet filter.

macroContext.title: Macro context
macroContext.subtitle: Market-wide weather report. Read every per-symbol signal in this context.

cryptoMetrics.title: Crypto metrics
cryptoMetrics.subtitle: Market depth, ATH/ATL distance, developer + community activity (CoinGecko).

socialSentiment.title: Retail sentiment
socialSentiment.subtitle: Combined StockTwits + Reddit chatter from the last 24 hours.

sectorStrength.title: Sector relative strength
sectorStrength.subtitle: Trailing return spread vs SPY/QQQ/IWM and the matching sector ETF; correlation and beta against SPY for the last 90 trading days.
sectorStrength.peerCountHelp: Benchmarks + sector ETF compared against this symbol

secFilings.title: SEC filings
secFilings.subtitle: EDGAR filings index from FMP — annual (10-K), quarterly (10-Q), material events (8-K), proxy statements (DEF 14A) and offerings.

news.title: News hub
news.subtitle: Headlines from every configured provider — Alpaca + FMP + Alpha Vantage news plus curated RSS feeds (boerse.de, ariva.de, Reuters). Filter by source, sentiment, time window, or symbol to find new tickers worth a closer look.
news.matchSummary: {{count}} items match the filters · sources active: {{sources}}
news.empty: No news matches the current filters.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Tickers worth a closer look — trending in the news right now, biggest movers today, and insider activity clusters from the last 90 days. Click any symbol to jump into its analysis page.

trending.title: Trending in the news
trending.subtitle: Symbols mentioned in the global news feed over the last 24 h, ranked by mention count. The trend percent compares against the previous 6-day baseline; the sentiment-burst delta tells you whether the chatter is shifting bullish or bearish.
trending.empty: No trending tickers in the last news cycle.

movers.title: Top movers today
movers.subtitle: Today's gainers, losers, and most-active US tickers (FMP). The most-active column doubles as a starting point for unusual-volume scenarios.

clusters.title: Insider clusters
clusters.subtitle: Symbols where 3+ unique insiders filed transactions in the last 90 days, ranked by insider count and absolute net value. A "buy cluster" with a large positive net value is one of the strongest non-public signals you can read.
clusters.empty: No insider clusters in the last 90 days — or FMP unconfigured.

docs.noTopic: No help available for this page yet.

pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of NexusPulse Trade is ready.

autoExecution.title: Auto-execution
autoExecution.subtitle: Phase 4 risk model + automation kill-switch. Every proposed automated trade has to clear all risk gates AND the halt-trigger checks AND the Net-Yield-Gate. The master switch ships disabled — turn it on only after configuring the limits below.
autoExecution.statusEnabledPaperHelp: Every 15 minutes the loop walks your watchlist, evaluates each symbol against all risk gates and halt triggers, and books matching trades into the internal paper book. NO Alpaca calls — no real money moves.
autoExecution.statusEnabledLiveHelp: WARNING: matching trades go to the configured Alpaca account. Phase 4e ships paper-mode validated; live-mode lives behind a separate gate that you flipped on intentionally.
autoExecution.statusDisabledHelp: No order will be placed automatically. Turn the switch on to opt in.
autoExecution.modePaperHint: Routes accepted proposals into the internal paper-trading book. No Alpaca, no real money.
autoExecution.modeLiveHint: Routes accepted proposals to your configured Alpaca account. Real money moves.
autoExecution.modeLiveLockedHint: Live mode is hard-locked in code until Phase 4f delivers a real broker adapter (Trade Republic, Flatex, Comdirect, Bitvavo, …). Cannot be enabled by accident.

events.title: Recent automation events
events.subtitle: Every evaluation, halt, and execution leaves an audit row here.

confirmEnable.title: Enable automation?
confirmEnable.body: I understand that turning this on permits the system to evaluate, accept, and (in future phases) place real broker orders within the limits I configured. The halt button stops everything immediately.

confirmHalt.title: Stop all automation?
confirmHalt.body: This disables the master switch and audits the halt event. Any open Alpaca limit orders will be canceled in Phase 4d reconciliation.

confirmLiveMode.title: Switch to live mode?
confirmLiveMode.body: Live mode routes accepted proposals to your configured Alpaca account. Real money will move. Validate the paper loop end-to-end first; flip this only when you trust the system.

macroCalendar.title: Macro calendar
macroCalendar.unconfigured: FRED_API_KEY not configured — set one in .env.local to surface treasury yields, commodities, and upcoming CPI/NFP/FOMC release dates.
